# Multi-value variable as deps
mk -n -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
# A variable is expanded to decide to run two sub-depenencies
deps = one two

test3.mk.o: $deps
	secondprocess ab

one:
	process bar

two:
	process rebar
-- expected --
two: process rebar
one: process bar
test3.mk.o: secondprocess ab
